description: Extended canonical mass table via markov_peel.tr_M_atomic (symbolic-q recursive ascent) + mpmath y_λ. Layer 1 canonical pipeline per docs/audits/2026-05-18-all-atoms-isotopes-plan.md. Coverage is determined by --atoms (see parameters.atoms_requested); the actual rows reflect what completed within the per-atom timeout. Each row carries the per-atom IsotopeRecord with explicit knot-operator catalogue (intra-nucleon, inter-nucleon interfaces, closure topology). For p and n, the prediction column is the Borromean-tower nucleon mass (conditional on conj:borromean-baryon-mass-formula, sub-ppm vs CODATA); for D and up the prediction column is the mass-table-ppb binding energy (Kashaev law / α-cluster / volume-match).
